title: [Seq] Add a pass to implement firreg randomization

features.name: init_random_prolog before random macro ordering
features.description: Code should include an initial block where `INIT_RANDOM_PROLOG_` macro appears before `RANDOM` macro calls used for register initialization

features.name: firreg random initialization with compreg
features.description: Code should include a register with async reset using RANDOM macro for initialization in an initial block before the always_ff block

features.name: automatic logic random variable assignment
features.description: Code should include automatic logic variables assigned from RANDOM macro used to initialize registers through bit slicing
